introSection: Montaña Rusa Infantil was an Intamin roller coaster that operated in Parque de la Ciudad from December 1982 to March, 2008.

sections.title: Ride
sections.content:
When the ride begins, the train slowly leaves the station and enters a gentle curve before engaging with the lift hill. The chain lift carries the small train smoothly up to a modest height of approximately 5 meters, making it approachable for young riders.

At the top, the train is released into a shallow descent that gradually picks up speed, reaching about 25 km/h. The track leads into a series of gentle slopes and wide curves, designed to create a light sense of motion without overwhelming forces.

Throughout the ride, the train navigates small dips and smooth turns, maintaining a steady, comfortable pace perfect for children experiencing their first roller coaster.

As the layout comes to an end, the train coasts into the final brake run, slowing down gently before returning to the station platform for unloading.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 4 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders.

fullText:
Montaña Rusa Infantil was an Intamin roller coaster that operated in Parque de la Ciudad from December 1982 to March, 2008.



When the ride begins, the train slowly leaves the station and enters a gentle curve before engaging with the lift hill. The chain lift carries the small train smoothly up to a modest height of approximately 5 meters, making it approachable for young riders.

At the top, the train is released into a shallow descent that gradually picks up speed, reaching about 25 km/h. The track leads into a series of gentle slopes and wide curves, designed to create a light sense of motion without overwhelming forces.

Throughout the ride, the train navigates small dips and smooth turns, maintaining a steady, comfortable pace perfect for children experiencing their first roller coaster.

As the layout comes to an end, the train coasts into the final brake run, slowing down gently before returning to the station platform for unloading.

Single train with 4 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders.
